summary: Comprehensive testing of Hestia Hotel Management Platform MVP completed successfully. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, dashboard, reservations, rooms management, and AI chat integration.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts display with -1 dimensions initially
Missing Description warnings for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Backend API - All 19 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Login page loads correctly with Royal Obsidian design
Dashboard displays KPIs and statistics correctly
Reservations page displays and allows new reservation creation
Rooms page shows room map with status indicators and filtering
AI Chat with both Hestia and Jarbas agents working
Responsive design and Royal Obsidian theme implemented
